events.title: Warm Up Workshop with Kamil
events.description: Learn how to warm up for lessons, performances, and competitions!  Great for everyone!

events.title: Arm Styling Intensive
events.description: This arm styling class focuses on developing graceful, expressive arm movements that enhance posture, musicality, and overall dance presentation. Dancers learn proper arm placement, fluid transitions, and styling techniques that complement partner work and elevate performance on the social floor or in competition.

events.title: Argentine Tango Intensive
events.description: This Argentine Tango class is a relaxed, fun way to explore this smooth and expressive dance. You’ll work on connection, partner movement, and musicality while getting more comfortable dancing with the music and each other.

events.title: FREE Kids Camp
events.description: Learn the basics of ballroom and Latin dances as you prepare for a show for family and friends on the last day of camp!

events.title: Dancing with the Local Stars
events.description: Classic Ballroom Dance Studio is proud to announce the date for our 2nd Annual Dancing with the Local Stars! Come watch our local celebrities as they compete for the mirror ball trophy! Tickets are now available online at https://hackettstownbid.com/.../dancing-with-the-local.../

events.title: FREE Summer Salsa Open House
events.description: Kick off summer with our special “Summer Salsa” Open House!  Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata for FREE, and don’t forget to bring a friend.
